tests.name: issueRegistryToken returns a signed JWT string
issueRegistryToken throws when private key env is missing
issueRegistryToken produces access: [] for empty scope
issueRegistryToken produces access: [] for scope with fewer than 3 parts
issueRegistryToken parses valid scope into access array
issueRegistryToken uses REGISTRY_TOKEN_ISSUER env
issueRegistryToken defaults issuer to viceregistry when env not set
computeGrantedScope returns empty string for empty scope
computeGrantedScope returns empty string for scope with fewer than 3 parts
computeGrantedScope admin grants all actions including delete and *
computeGrantedScope push role grants pull and push but not delete
computeGrantedScope viewer role grants pull only
computeGrantedScope no matching role grants nothing, returns empty string
computeGrantedScope unknown action is not granted
computeGrantedScope admin implies push and pull too
middleware public routes calls next() with no session on /login
middleware public routes attaches user from valid session on public route /dashboard
middleware public routes clears cookie on invalid session token on public route
middleware public routes allows /api/search without auth
middleware public routes allows /api/health without auth
middleware public routes allows /api/auth/token without auth
middleware public routes allows sub-paths of public routes
middleware unauthenticated access to protected routes returns 401 JSON for unauthenticated API request
middleware unauthenticated access to protected routes redirects to /login for unauthenticated page request
middleware DELETE /api/registry/* returns 401 when no user
middleware DELETE /api/registry/* returns 403 when non-admin user
middleware DELETE /api/registry/* calls next() when admin user
middleware admin-only routes returns 403 JSON for non-admin on /api/users
middleware admin-only routes redirects non-admin to /dashboard for /admin page
middleware admin-only routes calls next() for admin on /admin route
middleware admin-only routes calls next() for admin on /api/users
middleware auth-required non-admin routes calls next() for authenticated user on /settings
middleware auth-required non-admin routes calls next() for authenticated user on /api/auth/me
auth createSessionToken returns a JWT string
auth verifySessionToken round-trips a valid token
auth verifySessionToken throws on invalid token
auth verifySessionToken throws on token signed with wrong secret
auth getSecret — missing env var throws when SESSION_SECRET is absent
auth setSessionCookie calls cookies.set with correct options
auth clearSessionCookie calls cookies.delete with path /
cn merges class strings
cn handles conditional classes
cn resolves Tailwind conflicts
cn handles arrays
cn handles undefined/null
loginSchema accepts valid credentials
loginSchema rejects empty username
loginSchema rejects password over 256 chars
loginSchema rejects missing fields
createUserSchema accepts valid user
createUserSchema rejects username with invalid chars
createUserSchema rejects username too short
createUserSchema rejects invalid email
createUserSchema rejects password under 8 chars
createUserSchema rejects empty roles array
createUserSchema rejects invalid role value
createUserSchema accepts multiple roles
updateUserSchema accepts valid email update
updateUserSchema accepts isActive update
updateUserSchema accepts roles update
updateUserSchema accepts password update
updateUserSchema rejects empty object (no fields provided)
updateUserSchema rejects invalid email format
updateUserSchema rejects password under 8 chars
updateSettingsSchema accepts email-only update
updateSettingsSchema accepts password change with currentPassword
updateSettingsSchema rejects newPassword without currentPassword
updateSettingsSchema accepts empty object (all optional)
updateSettingsSchema rejects short newPassword
syncRepositories does nothing when registry returns empty list
syncRepositories upserts repository rows when names returned
syncRepository returns early when repo is not stale (synced recently)
syncRepository syncs when lastSyncedAt is null (missing entry)
syncRepository syncs when no repo entry exists in DB
syncRepository syncs when lastSyncedAt is older than 5 minutes
syncRepository upserts repository with tagCount=0 when no tags
syncRepository skips imageMetadata upsert when no tags
syncRepository upserts imageMetadata rows for ok manifests with layers
syncRepository uses fsLayers when layers absent
syncRepository skips tags with non-ok manifest responses
syncRepository skips rejected promise results from allSettled
syncRepository handles manifest with null config fields
syncRepository handles manifest with neither layers nor fsLayers
syncRepository uses 0 for layer size when size field is absent
syncRepository processes tags in batches (more than 8 tags)
syncAll calls syncRepository for each repo from registry
syncAll does nothing when registry empty
writeAuditLog calls db.insert with the entry
writeAuditLog logs error to console on execute failure, does not throw
registry-client listRepositories returns repos on ok response
registry-client listRepositories returns [] on non-ok response
registry-client listRepositories returns [] when repositories key missing
registry-client listRepositories calls correct URL path
registry-client listTags returns tags on ok response
registry-client listTags returns [] on non-ok response
registry-client listTags returns [] when tags key missing
registry-client getManifest returns the raw fetch response
registry-client getManifestDigest returns digest header value
registry-client getManifestDigest returns null when header absent
registry-client getManifestDigest calls fetch with HEAD method
registry-client deleteManifest calls fetch with DELETE method
registry-client proxyRegistryRequest passes through to registryFetch with Accept header
